prompt: Make the source portrait look like the reference, with the same depth and focus effect.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the source image, to match the depth of field and focus style of image 2. The man playing guitar in image 1 should be the primary subject in sharp focus, with the surrounding background (attic, walls, windows) rendered with a shallow depth of field and prominent bokeh blur, replicating the photographic effect of image 2.
